meta.title: Mathle Changelog
meta.description: Recent updates and release notes for the Mathle daily math puzzle.
heading: Changelog
intro: Recent updates to Mathle, the daily math Wordle-style puzzle.
release.heading: April 2026
release.items: Upgraded the site to Next.js App Router and TypeScript.
Added Daily, Hourly, and Infinite puzzle modes.
Added English and German language routes.
Added static SEO content for search engines and non-JavaScript visitors.
Added canonical and hreflang links for supported languages.
reconstruction.heading: Initial reconstruction
reconstruction.body: The playable Mathle experience was reconstructed from the captured static build, including puzzle progress, keyboard input, share text, and colorblind mode.
